project.name: devpiano
project.description: A JUCE + CMake + C++20 modernization of FreePiano with audio/MIDI routing, plugin hosting, settings persistence, and a mixed WSL/Windows validation workflow.

nodes.name: .clangd
nodes.summary: clangd configuration used with the WSL compile database for editor diagnostics and navigation.

nodes.name: build_msvc_from_wsl.sh
nodes.summary: Bridge script that triggers Windows-side MSVC validation from the WSL workflow.

nodes.name: build_wsl.sh
nodes.summary: WSL build helper for configuring and building the primary clang/Ninja tree.

nodes.name: configure_wsl.sh
nodes.summary: WSL configure-only helper for generating the compile database and CMake build files.

nodes.name: dev.sh
nodes.summary: Main developer entry script that dispatches self-check, WSL build, Windows sync, and Windows build tasks.

nodes.name: self_check.sh
nodes.summary: Environment validation script for WSL and Windows mirror workflow prerequisites.

nodes.name: sync_to_win.sh
nodes.summary: Sync helper that mirrors the WSL tree into the Windows validation tree.

nodes.name: AudioEngine.cpp
nodes.summary: Audio rendering implementation with a simple sine-synth fallback and plugin-first processing path.

nodes.name: AudioEngine.h
nodes.summary: Audio engine interface that mixes keyboard and external MIDI, renders either a loaded plugin or a fallback synth, and applies gain/ADSR.

nodes.name: AppState.h
nodes.summary: Runtime aggregate state types used to project persisted settings and live plugin/input status into UI-friendly snapshots.

nodes.name: AppStateBuilder.h
nodes.summary: Header-only bridge that combines persisted SettingsModel data with runtime plugin and input snapshots into AppState.

nodes.name: KeyMapTypes.h
nodes.summary: Core keyboard layout and note binding model, including default and full piano layouts for computer-keyboard input.

nodes.name: MidiTypes.h
nodes.summary: Small strong-type wrappers for MIDI note, channel, velocity, and ranges.

nodes.name: KeyboardMidiMapper.cpp
nodes.summary: Keyboard event translation logic that turns JUCE key presses into note on/off events while tracking held keys.

nodes.name: KeyboardMidiMapper.h
nodes.summary: Computer-keyboard to MIDI mapping interface based on reusable keyboard layout models.

nodes.name: AudioEngine.cpp
nodes.summary: Inactive prototype or transitional source retained for historical reference and experimentation outside the main build.

nodes.name: AudioEngine.h
nodes.summary: Inactive prototype or transitional source retained for historical reference and experimentation outside the main build.

nodes.name: MidiRouter.cpp
nodes.summary: Inactive prototype or transitional source retained for historical reference and experimentation outside the main build.

nodes.name: MidiRouter.h
nodes.summary: Inactive prototype or transitional source retained for historical reference and experimentation outside the main build.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Notes for inactive prototype code retained only as migration reference, not part of the main build.

nodes.name: SongEngine.cpp
nodes.summary: Inactive prototype or transitional source retained for historical reference and experimentation outside the main build.

nodes.name: SongEngine.h
nodes.summary: Inactive prototype or transitional source retained for historical reference and experimentation outside the main build.

nodes.name: Main.cpp
nodes.summary: JUCE application entry point that creates the main window and hosts MainComponent.

nodes.name: MainComponent.cpp
nodes.summary: Main runtime orchestration implementation for device setup, keyboard input, MIDI routing, plugin scanning/loading, settings persistence, and UI coordination.

nodes.name: MainComponent.h
nodes.summary: Main application composition header that wires audio, MIDI, plugin hosting, settings persistence, and UI panels together.

nodes.name: MidiRouter.cpp
nodes.summary: External MIDI input implementation that opens all available devices and pushes messages into the runtime collector.

nodes.name: MidiRouter.h
nodes.summary: MIDI input router interface that opens external MIDI devices and forwards messages to a collector and UI callback.

nodes.name: PluginHost.cpp
nodes.summary: VST3 host implementation that scans plugin directories, creates plugin instances, configures buses, and manages prepare/release lifecycle.

nodes.name: PluginHost.h
nodes.summary: Plugin host interface around JUCE plugin format management, VST3 scanning, loading, preparation, and unload lifecycle.

nodes.name: SettingsComponent.h
nodes.summary: Inline JUCE component for audio device selection and explicit settings save action inside a dialog window.

nodes.name: SettingsModel.h
nodes.summary: Persisted settings model covering audio device state, performance controls, plugin recovery fields, and keyboard layout serialization helpers.

nodes.name: SettingsStore.cpp
nodes.summary: Settings persistence implementation that stores XML-backed audio state, plugin recovery data, performance values, and key maps.

nodes.name: SettingsStore.h
nodes.summary: Settings persistence service interface built on JUCE ApplicationProperties.

nodes.name: ControlsPanel.cpp
nodes.summary: Controls panel implementation that exposes performance sliders and layout save/reset actions.

nodes.name: ControlsPanel.h
nodes.summary: Performance and layout controls panel interface for gain, ADSR, and keyboard layout selection.

nodes.name: HeaderPanel.cpp
nodes.summary: Header panel implementation for showing MIDI activity summary and a settings button.

nodes.name: HeaderPanel.h
nodes.summary: Header panel interface for title, hints, MIDI status display, and access to settings.

nodes.name: HeaderPanelStateBuilder.cpp
nodes.summary: Header panel view-model adapter implementation for MIDI status text.

nodes.name: HeaderPanelStateBuilder.h
nodes.summary: Helpers that derive HeaderPanel MIDI status view models from runtime input or app state.

nodes.name: KeyboardPanel.cpp
nodes.summary: Minimal virtual keyboard panel implementation.

nodes.name: KeyboardPanel.h
nodes.summary: Wrapper component for the on-screen JUCE MIDI keyboard.

nodes.name: PluginEditorWindow.cpp
nodes.summary: Plugin editor window implementation with a close callback back into MainComponent.

nodes.name: PluginEditorWindow.h
nodes.summary: Document window wrapper used to host a plugin-provided editor.

nodes.name: PluginPanel.cpp
nodes.summary: Plugin panel implementation that renders plugin discovery state and host actions.

nodes.name: PluginPanel.h
nodes.summary: Plugin control panel interface for scan/load/unload/editor actions and plugin list presentation.

nodes.name: PluginPanelStateBuilder.cpp
nodes.summary: Plugin panel view-model adapter implementation.

nodes.name: PluginPanelStateBuilder.h
nodes.summary: Helpers that adapt PluginHost or AppState data into PluginPanel view state.

nodes.name: build-windows.ps1
nodes.summary: PowerShell build implementation for the Windows MSVC verification tree.

nodes.name: sync-to-win.ps1
nodes.summary: PowerShell sync implementation used on the Windows side of the mixed workflow.

layers.name: Application Runtime
layers.description: JUCE application startup, orchestration, audio/MIDI backends, plugin hosting, core runtime models, and persisted settings services.

layers.name: User Interface
layers.description: JUCE components and view-model adapters that present runtime state, controls, plugin actions, and dialogs to the user.

layers.name: Build and Tooling
layers.description: Build configuration, editor configuration, and automation scripts for the WSL and Windows validation workflow.

layers.name: Documentation and Planning
layers.description: Project overviews, workflow guides, migration notes, test plans, and task tracking documents.

layers.name: Legacy Reference
layers.description: Inactive prototypes and original FreePiano sources kept only to understand historical behavior and guide migration decisions.

tour.title: Project Overview
tour.description: Start with the README to understand the modernization goal: replace the old Windows-specific FreePiano core with a JUCE-based app and workflow.

tour.title: Build and Startup Path
tour.description: Inspect the top-level build and application entry point to see how the JUCE app is compiled and how MainComponent becomes the root UI/runtime composition object.

tour.title: Runtime Composition
tour.description: MainComponent coordinates audio, MIDI, plugin hosting, settings persistence, and the read-only UI state snapshots used by panels.

tour.title: Audio and Plugin Host
tour.description: The core audio path feeds MIDI into AudioEngine, which prefers a loaded VST3 plugin but can fall back to a built-in sine synth when no plugin is active.

tour.title: Input and Interaction
tour.description: Computer keyboard mappings, external MIDI routing, controls, and visual keyboard UI all converge into the runtime audio path.

tour.title: Persistence and Workflow
tour.description: Settings persistence and the mixed WSL/Windows build scripts define how the app remembers state and how contributors validate changes.

tour.title: Migration Reference
tour.description: Use the legacy notes and old FreePiano source tree only as behavior reference when planning further JUCE migrations.
